name: Ashborn Seven
specialty: A tight-knit group of specialists known for their ability to navigate the treacherous rifts of the Undercity, retrieving valuable relics and artifacts that others dare not touch.

members.name: Thaddeus Vos
members.note: A veteran of the Iron Fang Consortium who left after a bitter falling-out, carrying the weight of his past with him in the form of a heavy, scratched metal gauntlet.

members.name: Ria Elara
members.note: A former Wardens of Ash scout who defected after witnessing the corruption that had taken root within the organization, her keen eyes always scanning for potential threats.

visual: The Ashborn Seven wear simple, utilitarian clothing that blends with the shadows, their gear including sturdy leather vests and boots, each adorned with a small, glowing ember symbolizing their bond. In public, they move with purpose and an air of quiet confidence.
reputation_note: Rumored to have connections within multiple factions, the Ashborn Seven are a force to be reckoned with, their names whispered with a mix of awe and caution in the dark alleys of the Undercity.
